programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Living with abundant resources, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie lives a solitary life in Manhattan; estranged from family, jobless, and having boyfriend problems.

programme.title: Vanguard
programme.desc: Covert security company Vanguard is the last hope of survival for an accountant after he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, part of a top-secret tactical command unit, try to smuggle a mysterious police officer with sensitive information out of Indonesia.

programme.title: The 355
programme.desc: When a top-secret weapon falls into mercenary hands, a wild-card C.I.A. agent joins forces with three international agents on a mission to retrieve it.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: In the not so distant future, society is controlled by the powerful State and a dictator known as the Director. Condor works as a hitman for the State, but a reunion with someone he thought was dead forces him to consider who his enemies really are.

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 12 / 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: Elated at returning to their true form, Manle and Yutong return to their families while Chris gets stuck with Alex. Their joy doesn’t last. This is only a small reward for their efforts and they return to their aged form the next day. While helping the trio, Manxin and Alex start developing feelings for each other. Meanwhile, the trio slowly fall into Cheh Nam’s trap.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 31 / 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 15 / 侠医

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism. A cat-and-mouse conflict ensues with a government official, whose past may hold clues to the killers' identities.

programme.title: The Fast & The Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: A teenager becomes a major competitor in the world of drift racing after moving in with his father in Tokyo to avoid a jail sentence in America.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: Stephanie is a single mother who befriends Emily, an upper-class woman who has a child at the same elementary school. When Emily goes missing, Stephanie takes it upon herself to investigate.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: Former cop Brian O'Conner is called upon to bust a dangerous criminal and he recruits the help of a former childhood friend and street racer who has a chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Black Water: Abyss
programme.desc: Trapped in a flooded cave, a group of adventurers fighting for survival realise they have another thing to worry about: a pack of hungry crocodiles.

programme.title: Notorious Nick
programme.desc: Nick Newell, a one-armed MMA fighter, gets a rare chance to fight for the lightweight championship. He strives to win for himself and all the other people in the world with physical challenges.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer
programme.desc: An intuitive but troubled police officer is recruited by an FBI expert to stop a relentless shooter who is terrorizing Baltimore.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: When fugitive Dominic Toretto returns to Los Angeles to avenge a loved one's death, it reignites his feud with agent Brian O'Conner. But, as they race through crowded city streets and across international lines, they must test their loyalties by joining together to bring down a shared enemy.

programme.desc: A Special Forces Agent is assigned to protect a scientist and his creation from a sinister gang.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Cinta
programme.desc: 2 gadis kilang memenangi percutian menginap di hotel mewah dan mereka mula bergaya seperti anak orang kaya...

programme.title: Lepak@Les'Copaque: Upin & Ipin S10 Ep16
programme.desc: Upin, Ipin dan kawan-kawan menghabiskan cuti sekolah mereka dengan bermain pelbagai jenis permainan. Selain bermain, Upin, Ipin dan kawan-kawan telah belajar tentang seuatu dari Tok Dalang. Selepas sesi persekolahan bermula semula, Cikgu Melati minta murid-murid untuk membentangkan hasil kerja mereka. Kerja apakah yang diminta oleh Cikgu Melati itu? Saksikan jawapannya dalam episod 'Bila Cuti Seko

programme.title: Hentian Gerik

programme.title: Sesat Ep09

programme.title: Jurm
programme.desc: Avinash, a rich businessman, wakes up one morning to find himself being arrested for the murder of his wife Sanjana, whom he suspected of cheating on him.

programme.title: Ishqedarriyan
programme.desc: Aagam, a millionaire, falls in love with Luvleen, a teacher. However, she is in love with Arjun and Aagam does everything to make her happy, even sacrificing his love for her.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: An orphan joins RAW, the foreign intelligence agency of India. During a mission, all of his comrades die and he decides to seek revenge to find peace in his life.

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: A thug helps kidnap grooms in order to avoid paying out dowries for their upcoming marriage.

programme.title: Karz
programme.desc: Monty discovers the shocking truth about his past life when he was killed by his gold-digger wife, while his family was rendered homeless. Supported by his lover, he decides to set things right.

programme.title: Hero Hindustani
programme.desc: A man realizes that India is completely alien to his London-raised granddaughter and arranges her marriage there. She gets a guide to pose as her fiance and falls for him.

programme.title: Super Nani
programme.desc: Mann's grandmother Bharti is scorned and ill-treated by her family. To make them realise her worth, Mann gives her a complete makeover and also convinces her to take up modelling opportunities.

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Ajay Mehra, an amateur boxer, takes revenge against Balwant Rai, a crooked businessman, after his elder brother is killed.

programme.title: Valimai
programme.desc: Arjun, an IPS officer sets out for a mission on hunting down illegal bikers involving in theft and murder.

programme.desc: Ganga, a young housemaid, religiously worships a snake mound. However, she is unaware that it is actually a cobra that is waiting to unleash its fury on the members of the household and exact revenge.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep29
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.desc: Stay tuned to find out more about the life and journeys of Lord Hanuman.

programme.title: Kanyadanam (ML) Ep15

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Ting. 3 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan cara membuat dan menentusahkan konjektur tentang hubungan antara sudut tirus dan nisbah sisi segi tiga bersudut tegak, serta metakrifkan sinus, kosinus dan tangen.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Ting. 3 Ep01
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan mengenai sisi bertentangan dan sisi bersebelahan dalam segi tiga bersudut tegak, hubungan antara sudut tirus dan nisbah sisi segi tiga bersudut tegak.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sains Ting. 3 Ep03

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 1 Ep05

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 1 Ep06

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 2 Ep01

programme.title: TVP@TTV Matematik Tingkatan 2 Ep02

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Tahun 1 Ep01
programme.desc: Topik ini mengenai adab terhadap keluarga. Murid mempelajari cara terbaik bergaul dengan keluarga mengikut sunnah Rasulullah SAW.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Ibaratnya Gini Wir, Lu Digoreng Tapi Gamon
programme.desc: Bella wanted to learn about entrepreneurship, so she partnered with a handsome guy who, as it turned out, she found very annoying. Bella then felt resentful toward the guy, causing him to be afraid of contacting her again. However, the guy later disguised himself as a blind man, then as a bemo driver, and drove Bella home.

programme.title: Keliatan Banget Nyenggol Hati King Dosen
programme.desc: As Galang passed by, a man wearing the same jacket ran past him. A few moments later, someone came to chase Erin's purse pickpocket. Galang was nearly beaten by the mob. Galang was accused of stealing Erin's wallet. Ultimately, Galang was rescued and acquitted. Erin searched for the house address and managed to find Lalu, who introduced himself as Johan's son. programme.title: Bidadari Surgamu
programme.desc: It tells the story of a girl named Sakinah who lives a life full of pressure due to slander and is forced to marry a person who does not love her. Not only that, Sakinah was even prevented from knowing who her biological mother had the heart to throw her away. How does Sakinah's life story continue?

programme.title: Walau Bukan Jodoh Udah Sambungin Aja
programme.desc: Tari heard that her boss's son was working at her office. Tari thought that her boss's son was Langit, not Gala, because it was impossible for her boss to ask his son to work as an office boy. However, several events brought Tari closer to Gala because Gala was so attentive to her.

programme.title: Cinta Kan Membawamu Ke Titik Bahagia
programme.desc: Reno, who is only a pecel seller, meets Tiara, who pretends to be a person with a disability, to explore Reno. Tiara has to put on a show because she was told by Reno's father to keep an eye on Reno and investigate Reno's life. But in the middle of her duties, Tiara falls in love with Reno as well as Rno who turns out to have her heart for Tiara.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: The Electra crew tests out the plane that crash landed last year by landing on an ice strip while a hotshot Australian pilot tries for a job at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Devan threatens to punch David in mid-air, Joe blows up at his crew, the water-bombers arrive at “Iron Maiden” singer Bruce Dickinson's hangar in Wales, and Will threatens to quit.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Beekeeper Ian extract a bee colony from a family home, then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to remove a Great Horned Owl from a house.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai's thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there's more bad news that could put Sarah's big plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: "The Wine Rack kitchen is operational and finally Sarah is able to begin training the staff. With a completely new menu there's a lot to learn and very little time. Meanwhile, Sarah explores the sweeter side of Mumbai's food offerings.".

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: My Second Restaurant in India
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah's new menu.

5 Minit
programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih - Trailer
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Adelia, seorang wanita berkerjaya yang kehilangan suami secara mengejut, lalu berusaha sembuh bersama anaknya dan sahabat baik arwah, menemui makna cinta dan peluang kedua dalam hidup hari ini.

programme.title: Cinta
programme.desc: Lima cerita yang mengisahkan tentang cinta dari perspektif berbeza. Lakonan Sharifah Amani, Pierre Andre, Fasha Sandha, Eizlan Yusof, Rita Rudaini dan ramai lagi.

programme.title: Istanbul Aku Datang
programme.desc: Dian yang menyewa sebuah apartment di Istanbul ditipu oleh anak pemilik apartment itu dan bertemu Harris yang juga tinggal di situ. Dapatkah Dian menghalau Harris dari apartment itu?

programme.title: Mat Tudung
programme.desc: Seorang buaya darat yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang wanita cantik yang berhijab merancang untuk menarik perhatiannya dengan menyamar. Namun, percubaannya menyebabkan kekecohan yang tidak dijangka!

programme.title: Anak Emak
programme.desc: Kisah seorang ibu tua yang semakin dimamah usia terpaksa pula menumpang dengan anaknya yang baru sahaja bercerai. Dibintangi oleh pasangan ibu dan anak iaitu Seniwati Mariani Ismail dan Melissa Saila.

programme.title: Nana Tanjung
programme.desc: Nana, seorang balu membesarkan tiga anak perempuan di Penang. Akhbar mencintai Khairunisa tetapi Nana merancang jodoh lain. Mereka cuba meyakinkan Nana, namun Nana mengumumkan pertunangannya.

programme.title: Cun
programme.desc: Kisah Luna seorang pengacara TV popular membawa diri ke sebuah kampung lalu bertemu seorang pemuda kampung bernama Atan lalu jatuh cinta. Lakonan Remy Ishak, Maya Karin, Faezah Elai, Nadiya Nisaa dan Ning Baizura.

programme.title: Karya 12 Vol 2: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Kelas Belakang Ep02
programme.desc: Kelas Belakang

programme.title: Puteri Impian
programme.desc: Impian Nora, seorang gadis kilang menjadi puteri raja menjadi kenyataan apabila memenangi peraduan yang dianjurkan stesen TV. Lakonan Amy Mastura

programme.title: Mami Jarum
programme.desc: Kisah Mami yang suka mencucuk jarum, mengumpat dan membawa cerita akhirnya terkena pada batang hidung sendiri. Dibintangi oleh Kartina Aziz, Rita Rudaini, Vanidah Imran dan Rosnah Mat Aris.

programme.title: New Land, Broken Road
programme.desc: On a muddy, deserted road, 3 young hip-hop dancers meet a young female street vendor with a colourful cart.

programme.desc: Walid, tokoh berpengaruh yang disanjung, di sebalik wajah menyimpan rahsia. Apabila kebenaran terbongkar, kepercayaan hancur dan kuasa mula runtuh. Siapakah Walid sebenarnya?

programme.title: Oh Mak Kau
programme.desc: Dua beradik suka mencuri dan membuat ibu mereka marah sehinggalah kehadiran Que yang berjaya memikat hati mereka.

programme.title: Dream Man
programme.desc: Sekumpulan lima rakan mula mengalami peristiwa ngeri sejak akaun Facebook misteri menghantar permintaan untuk menjadi rakan kepada mereka.

programme.title: Janji Zehan-Lahzeye Bi Payan
programme.desc: A young newlywed couple, Zehan and Arman, decide to go to Shiraz in Iran for their honeymoon. But soon their fairy tale romance starts to crack as the true meaning of marriage puts their relationship to the test. Starring Nur Fazura and Amir Rezazadeh. Directed by Bernard Chauly.

programme.title: Kampung Latah Kena Kuarantin
programme.desc: Ajin adalah pekerja di syarikat pelancongan di Kampung Latah Permai. Gelagatnya menghiburkan penduduk kampung dan pelancong. Satu hari, kampung itu dilanda sindrom 'melatah' dan menjadi tidak terkawal.
